---
title: "Elizabeth Fry"
---

## Elizabeth Fry

**Dates:** (1780-1845)

**Maiden name:** (Gurney)

### Description

prison visitor

### Biography

She was the subject of a biography by Ann Carter Smith in the first series of <i>Biographies of Good Women</i> (1862).

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 12th 1860
- Letter from Decr 4th 1860

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
